# Works With Agents — UK Education (Full Reference)

> The missing manual for working with AI agents, with UK regulatory compliance context.
> **Status: LIVE.** UK mirror of workswithagents.com. Cloudflare Pages.
> **Concise index:** [llms.txt](https://workswithagents.co.uk/llms.txt)
> **Global:** [workswithagents.com/llms-full.txt](https://workswithagents.com/llms-full.txt)
> **Knowledge API:** [workswithagents.dev/llms-full.txt](https://workswithagents.dev/llms-full.txt)
> **Blueprint Registry:** [workswithagents.io/llms.txt](https://workswithagents.io/llms.txt)

---

## What This Is

UK mirror of the Works With Agents education platform. Same 10-pattern methodology, same course. Plus UK-specific compliance context: NHS, financial services (FCA/PRA), government (GDS). GDPR + UK DPA 2018. On-prem LLM for regulated environments.

---

## What's Actually Live

| Component | Status | Details |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| workswithagents.co.uk | ✅ Live | UK landing page. Cloudflare Pages. |

| workswithagents.dev | ✅ Live | Knowledge Platform API. |
| workswithagents.io | ✅ Live | Blueprint Registry. |
| bastiongateway.com | ✅ Live | Operations infrastructure. |
| 10-pattern methodology | ✅ Documented | 153 skills. Hands-on experimentation. |
| UK compliance courses | ❌ Coming Soon | NHS/finance/govt track in development. |
| Consulting | ❌ Coming Soon | 0 clients. Pre-revenue. |

---

## The 10 Patterns

### 1. Boot — First Session Setup
AGENTS.md, environment, initial memory. Critical for regulated environments where audit trails start at session 0.

### 2. Skills — Reusable Procedural Knowledge
SKILL.md files loaded on-demand. 153 skills in library. Compliance skills: DTAC template, DPIA generator, GDS checklist.

### 3. Memory — Durable Context Across Sessions
Never re-explain. 50+ durable facts. For regulated: every decision recorded, attributed, queryable.

### 4. Decision Protocols — Autonomy Without Chaos
When to ask, when to decide. For regulated: sign-off gates, human-in-the-loop for compliance-sensitive decisions.

### 5. Tool Composition — Right Tool for Each Job
Terminal, files, web, delegation. Audit logging for every tool use in regulated environments.

### 6. Orchestration — Multi-Agent Workflows
Parallel specialists. 3x throughput. For regulated: review gates between agent steps, compliance officer sign-off.

### 7. Pipelines — Agents That Run While You Sleep
Cron, builds, monitoring. ~20 autonomous agents in fleet. Silent unless broken pattern.

### 8. Resilience — Never-Stop Loops
Exponential backoff. 11 consecutive builds with zero human intervention.

### 9. Verify — Trust But Verify
Automated gates. 77% test pass rate across 61 tests. For regulated: compliance verification built into quality gates.

### 10. Compounding — Agents That Get Better
Discoveries → skills → forever. 153 skills and growing.

---

## UK Regulatory Context

These patterns are being adapted for UK regulated industries:

### NHS & Healthcare
- DTAC-aligned agent patterns (Digital Technology Assessment Criteria)
- Clinical safety: every agent decision logged, signed-off, auditable
- On-prem M365 integration — zero data leaves the tenant
- HSCN/N3 network considerations

### Financial Services
- FCA/PRA alignment: Senior Managers Regime — every agent decision attributable to a named individual
- Audit trails: immutable, time-stamped, queryable
- Consumer Duty: agent decisions must be explainable to consumers

### Government
- GDS alignment: Service Standard, Technology Code of Practice
- WCAG 2.1 AA maintained through agent workflows
- Welsh Language Act consideration (bilingual where required)
- Assessment evidence auto-generated by agent compliance gates

---

## On-Prem LLM for Regulated Environments

For NHS, finance, and government where data must stay on-prem:
- 7-9B parameter Q4 quantized models
- Runs on existing M365 infrastructure
- No API calls to external LLM providers
- Compliance audit trail built into every agent interaction
- Tenant-contained: data processing stays within your tenancy

---

## Compliance Framework (Planned)

### Regulated Handoff Protocol
Extension of the baseline Handoff Protocol with compliance fields: audit trail, sign-off gates, data classification, regulatory references. Submitted as extension proposals to MCP (SEP process) and Google A2A.

### GDPR & UK DPA 2018
Data processor role. UK-only data centres. Data Processing Agreement available. Right to deletion — self-service via API.

### On-Prem Deployment
Run your own Knowledge Platform behind the firewall. Syncs facts, skills, and pitfalls from the public registry while keeping your internal data air-gapped. Docker image planned.

---

## Courses — Coming Soon

### Works With Agents: The 10 Patterns (Flagship)
Same course as .com. Self-paced. 10 modules. Agent setup for Hermes, Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Cursor.

### Regulated Industry Track
Compliance-first patterns. NHS DTAC. FCA/PRA. GDS. On-prem LLM deployment. Audit trails built-in.

*Pricing and launch dates: Coming Soon. Join newsletter for updates.*

## Founders

**Vilius Vystartas** — Technical founder. M365 Developer. Built the methodology through hands-on agent experimentation. Cardiff, UK.

**Pelin Kayhan** — Co-owner. Business operations and compliance. Manages client relationships, UK regulatory alignment, and business development. Cardiff, UK.

---

## Architecture

**Hosting:** Cloudflare Pages (same project as .com, custom domain .co.uk)
**SSL:** Cloudflare Flexible (HTTPS edge)
**Content:** Mirror of workswithagents.com with UK compliance additions
**i18n:** English primary. Welsh under Welsh Language Act consideration.
